adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): Mid-market China plasma power = features-per-yuan commodity fight by 2030; Hengyunchang/Injet down-market motion; arc-quench IP insufficient moat.

concept: Deterministic facility timing and fast machine-interlock platform (White Rabbit / IEEE 1588 class) productized for Chinese big-science facilities and industrial accelerators
named_buyer_examples: IHEP facilities (procurement style evidenced by HEPS China-manufacturer-only tenders, L07-045)
ASIPP - ITER magnet-feeder supplier and CFETR-era integrator (L13-035)
industrial accelerator integrators needing synchronized pulsed systems (CGN Dasheng-class, L05-035)
painful_job: Big-science I&C integration is a documented structural burden (ITER's split in-fund/in-kind procurement across ~161 plant systems, L13-030), and sub-ns facility timing (White Rabbit extending IEEE 1588-2019, L13-026/027) only became an open multi-vendor ecosystem in 2024 - Chinese facilities scaling through the 2030s must integrate timing + machine-protection from research-grade components with no productized, supported domestic-compatible platform.
product: A hardened timing-and-interlock product line: White-Rabbit-grade switches/nodes (sub-ns sync), deterministic fast-interlock I/O crates (microsecond machine-protection logic), and configuration/monitoring software - delivered with long-term support contracts and China-compatible licensing (open-hardware lineage eases localization).
frontier_vision: The nervous system of every large machine - accelerators, fusion plants, gravitational observatories, and eventually distributed industrial beam/pulsed-power fleets.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: build on open White Rabbit designs; contribute upstream (visibility); benchtop sync demo at <100 ps skew across 10 nodes. 2027-2028: fast-interlock crate prototype with formal-verified logic; publish reliability analysis; engage one Asian facility control group for requirements. 2028-2029: pilot deployment at a university accelerator/test stand; define China licensing/manufacture structure (open-hardware model permits domestic fabrication with our support layer).
launch_2030_timing_thesis: White Rabbit's multi-vendor commercialization window opened 2024 (L13-027); Chinese facility pipeline (post-HEPS, CFETR-era) ramps in the 15th/16th FYP; support-and-integration layers resist commoditization even when hardware is open.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: CFETR/BEST-era fusion facility I&C procurement (ASIPP integrator role documented via ITER feeders, L13-035; construction decision undated - flagged, L03-024) and next-round CAS light-source/collider control systems (procurement style per L07-045); industrial-accelerator synchronization demand grows with CGN Dasheng-class fleets (L05-035).
competition_outlook_2030: European White Rabbit vendors; Chinese institute in-house control groups (strong: publishing at ISSCC/VLSI level, L13-022/023); the export-control environment (US 2024 quantum rule, L13-031) pushes Chinese buyers toward non-US suppliers - a structural opening for a non-US-domiciled vendor, and a compliance wall for a US-person founder (must scope strictly to non-quantum, non-controlled facility timing; counsel required).
timing_window_risk: China-only procurement rules likely (L07-045) - license/JV route; export-control scoping is the gating uncertainty; institute in-house culture may self-supply. Confidence low-medium.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-12-31: kill if export-control scoping fails or no facility pilot by end-2033.
extreme_edge: Deterministic microsecond interlocks generalize to fusion-plant plasma-protection and grid-scale power-electronics coordination.
first_experiment: 2027-Q4: 10-node White-Rabbit-class network holds <100 ps synchronization skew over 5 km fiber for 30 days while the interlock crate demonstrates <10 microsecond verified trip latency across 1,000 injected fault scenarios.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): Open hardware = born-commodity; support/integration is consulting-shaped; Chinese institutes self-supply; China-only procurement + quantum export scoping unresolved.

concept: 225-300C downhole electronics module: SOI/SiC hybrid controller, sensor interface and power stage with optional active cooling, filling the CISSOID-obsolescence gap for Chinese deep-well and geothermal drilling
named_buyer_examples: Chinese downhole-tool OEMs and oilfield service institutes (drilling-side bottlenecks diagnosed by China University of Petroleum review, L15-021)
Chinese harsh-environment sensor programs (XJTU 4H-SiC pressure-sensor groups, L15-006/007) needing qualified readout/power electronics
painful_job: The established commercial 225C IC families are dying: CISSOID's CHT line is marked obsolete/last-time-buy with no public successor (L15-043), while no industry platform exists above ~250C (SOI to ~300C small-signal, L15-004; SiC ICs lab-proven to 500C at NASA, L15-009; DARPA still funding 800C basics in 2026, L15-026); Chinese deep gas/geothermal drilling literature explicitly flags high-temperature capability gaps (L15-021), and radiation/thermal qualification do not transfer (L15-013, L15-020) - so Chinese tool OEMs face a sourcing discontinuity exactly as wells go deeper/hotter.
product: A qualified downhole electronics module: 225C-rated SOI controller + SiC power stage + precision sensor front-end in a single hermetic chassis, with a plug-in sorption/evaporative active-cooling cartridge extending missions in 250-300C zones (mechanism: hybrid strategy bridging the documented native-HT vs active-cooling split, L15-023/024), delivered with full qualification data packs.
frontier_vision: The Honeywell-successor platform for hot electronics: downhole, geothermal, aero-engine, then 500C SiC-native modules as NASA-class IC processes mature.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: architecture + component screening (available SOI processes, SiC discretes); 225C soak/cycling testbed; publish gap analysis of the CHT-obsolescence fallout. 2027-2028: module prototype surviving 1,000 h at 225C with <5% drift; sorption-cooling cartridge demo at 275C ambient. 2028-2029: field-representative qualification (vibration + temperature per MIL-STD-883-class methods, L15-026-era specs as reference); customer discovery with Chinese tool OEMs via HK channel; small-batch supply agreement drafts.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Supply gap opened 2025-2026 (CISSOID obsolescence, L15-043) and no converged replacement exists (20+ years of programs without a platform, L15-026/029/031-lineage per brief); Chinese buyers are the least served by Western defense-adjacent suppliers - a 2030 merchant module vendor arrives into unfilled sockets, not a commoditized market.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named candidates requiring P4 verification: Chinese deep-well gas (Sichuan/Tarim archetype) and hot-dry-rock geothermal programs implied by the L15-021 research push - the atlas contains NO named Chinese procurement for HT electronics (transparency asymmetry explicitly documented in the L15 brief), so this trigger is the seed's weakest link and is flagged as such; global corroboration: superhot-geothermal trajectory (ARPA-E SUPERHOT >375C targets, L15-029).
competition_outlook_2030: Texas Instruments HT catalog parts (partial), surviving CISSOID lines under new ownership, Chinese institute in-house hybrids (CAS microelectronics base, L15-013/020); competition thin precisely because the market is hard - qualification data is the moat.
timing_window_risk: Demand evidence for China is inferential; oilfield SOE access requires tool-OEM channel; dual-use review needed. Treat as high-upside/low-confidence; kill early on demand-discovery failure.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-06-30: kill if 2027-2028 customer discovery cannot produce two Chinese tool-OEM LOIs.
extreme_edge: Path to 500C SiC-native control (NASA-demonstrated physics, L15-009) for Venus-class and turbine-embedded electronics.
first_experiment: 2027-Q4: hybrid module (SOI controller + SiC power stage + sensor AFE) completes 1,000 h at 225C plus 200 thermal cycles with <5% parametric drift and zero failures; cooling cartridge holds internal temperature <=225C in a 275C oven for 8 h.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): Atlas contains no named Chinese HT-electronics procurement (self-flagged); China-primary company on inferential demand fails the demand rule; revisit from A-14 if evidence appears.

concept: Flywheel-plus-power-conditioning transient stabilization modules for Chinese AI datacenter parks: GPU load-swing buffering, ride-through, and generator-start bridging without batteries
named_buyer_examples: Chinese hyperscale/colo operators in Dong-Shu-Xi-Suan hub parks (Alibaba HVDC lineage, L02-048/049)
Chinese datacenter power integrators adopting 800VDC (L02-054)
painful_job: AI racks create MW-scale, fast load swings and power-quality stress on park-level infrastructure; the use case is proven by a named Western deployment - Piller's SHIELDX flywheel stabilization selected for a 400 MW off-grid AI datacenter plant (Dec-2025 shipments, L16-052) - while China's hub-node buildout (L02-049) under PUE caps (L14-035) needs battery-free, high-cycle transient buffering that chemical UPS handles poorly. Demand-bridge seed: US evidence + named Chinese policy/park context, per atlas enthusiasm-zone rules.
product: A containerized module: high-cycle steel/composite flywheel + SiC bidirectional converter delivering seconds-scale MW buffering, sub-cycle ride-through, and diesel/turbine start bridging, DC-coupled to 800V park buses (integration per L02-054 pain map); unlimited cycling and 20-year life vs battery degradation.
frontier_vision: Kinetic power quality as standard datacenter infrastructure, extending to grid-forming inertia services and industrial pulse loads.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: system modeling of GPU-park load transients; converter-flywheel co-simulation; identify Chinese flywheel manufacturing partners. 2027-2028: 100 kW lab prototype (purchased rotor + custom converter/control); validated response <2 ms; patents on DC-coupled control with 800V bus damping (synergy with B-03). 2028-2029: co-demonstration proposal with one Chinese integrator; field data from a partner park.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Chinese AI park power architectures stabilize on HVDC through 2027-2029; transient/power-quality retrofits become procurable line items 2030+; flywheels avoid battery fire-code friction in dense parks.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: Dong-Shu-Xi-Suan hub-node expansion (L02-049) and 800VDC park rollouts (L02-048/054) during the 15th FYP, with the Piller 400 MW AI-plant precedent (L16-052) as the reference architecture Chinese operators will replicate.
competition_outlook_2030: Piller (L16-052), Chinese UPS majors adding flywheels, battery-BESS as default substitute. Must win on cycle life + DC-coupling integration; if BESS pricing keeps collapsing, niche narrows to highest-cycle applications.
timing_window_risk: Demand-bridge risk (no named Chinese flywheel-datacenter buyer yet - flagged); BESS substitution; foreign access via integrator design-in. Confidence low-medium.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-12-31: kill if no Chinese park pilot commitment by end-2033 or if BESS demonstrably wins the transient niche.
extreme_edge: Same modules provide inertia for isolated microgrids and pulsed industrial loads (accelerators, lasers).
first_experiment: 2028-Q2: 100 kW flywheel-converter module responds to a scripted 0-100% load step in <2 ms and sustains 100,000 charge/discharge cycles in accelerated testing without capacity fade.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): CN demand bridge admitted absent; Piller precedent is Western. D-19 carries the concept.

concept: Precision pulsed laser-driver and timing electronics modules (GaN sub-ns drivers, ps-class timing) for Chinese ultrafast/micromachining laser OEMs climbing out of the high-power price war
named_buyer_examples: Han's Laser - high-power segment ASP collapse documented (-6.6% revenue on +30.5% units, 2025) while PCB/IT equipment grew 50% on AI-server demand (L12-037)
Wuhan Raycus - pivoting up-market, ultrafast lines and record exports (L12-038)
Maxphotonics and the domestic top-3 cluster (L12-054, 2021-vintage share data flagged)
painful_job: China's high-power cutting market is commoditized (price war documented in Han's/IPG filings, L12-037, L12-034), forcing OEMs into ultrafast/precision segments where laser-diode drive electronics are still a research frontier - GaN high-peak-power pulsed drivers (L12-027), modulation-shape control (L12-025), and sub-ns/ps-resolution digital drivers (L12-026) are active 2025-2026 publications, not catalog parts - so every OEM rebuilds driver electronics in-house at NRE cost.
product: A driver-module family: GaN-based sub-ns pump/seed drivers with programmable pulse shaping, ps-jitter trigger/timing distribution, and burst-mode energy control - qualified modules OEMs drop into ultrafast, UV-drilling, and precision-marking platforms.
frontier_vision: The 'driver silicon + timing' layer of global photonic tools - from PCB drilling to bio-imaging to LiDAR production test.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: GaN driver prototype hitting published state-of-art (sub-ns edges at high peak current, replicating L12-027-class results); jitter characterization bench. 2027-2028: pulse-shaping firmware + burst control; publish; patents on shape-feedback linearization. 2028-2029: design-in evaluation with one Chinese ultrafast OEM (via HK component channel); reliability data (10^12 pulse demonstration).
launch_2030_timing_thesis: The price war pushes OEM roadmaps up-market now (documented 2025 filings); ultrafast toolchains scale with AI-server PCB/substrate drilling through the decade (Han's PCB segment growth, L12-037); driver electronics remain uncommoditized because performance is still research-grade in 2026.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: AI-server advanced-PCB/substrate capacity expansion in China (documented demand driver at Han's, L12-037) pulling UV/ultrafast drilling tools - and their driver electronics - through 2030-2034; Raycus-class ultrafast product-line expansion (L12-038).
competition_outlook_2030: OEM in-house electronics teams (default), analog-semi vendors' generic drivers, EU boutique driver houses. Win on integration depth (shape+timing+telemetry) and cost at Chinese volume.
timing_window_risk: Component price pressure from OEM insourcing; access moderate (component design-in, HK channel); IP protection on firmware-heavy product manageable.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-12-31: kill if no OEM design-win by end-2033.
extreme_edge: ps-class drive/timing modules feed directed-energy and EUV-adjacent instrumentation markets (export-permitting).
first_experiment: 2027-Q2: GaN driver module delivers programmable 0.5-5 ns current pulses at >=50 A peak with <20 ps RMS trigger jitter and demonstrated closed-loop pulse-shape control on a test diode array.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): Import price-war-driven up-market OEM pivot logic as C-13's CN demand chapter.

concept: High-power ultrasonic weld generator with inline physics-based weld-quality monitoring for EV battery tab/busbar welding lines
named_buyer_examples: CATL and BYD lines via equipment integrators - the two accounted for >50% of Jiaocheng Ultrasonic's comparable 2021 equipment purchases (L16-028; staleness flagged)
Chinese battery-equipment integrators (Jiaocheng-class, est. 20-30% share, L16-028)
painful_job: EV battery ultrasonic tab welding is buyer-concentrated, high-volume Chinese manufacturing (L16-028) where weld quality drives scrap and field-failure risk; generator+transducer control and inline quality assurance remain differentiators as cell formats and multi-layer foils evolve - but the newest quantified market data is 2021-vintage (explicitly flagged in atlas), and domestic incumbents are strong.
product: A weld cell brain: high-stability ultrasonic generator (adaptive frequency/amplitude control under load) plus inline monitoring that classifies weld quality from electrical-impedance and acoustic signatures in real time (physics-model-based, not generic ML), with closed-loop parameter correction.
frontier_vision: Acoustic process control platform extending to wire bonding, busbar welding, and solid-state-battery stack joining.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: lab weld cell; correlate impedance/acoustic signatures with destructive-test quality on Cu/Al foils; publish. 2027-2028: closed-loop control prototype; patents. 2028-2029: pilot on one integrator's line; decide go/no-go against incumbent feature parity.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Only viable if next-generation cell formats (thicker stacks, new chemistries) reset weld-control requirements around 2030; otherwise incumbents hold. Weakest-thesis seed - kept as a discardable extra.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: CATL/BYD-driven equipment replacement cycles (L16-028) - but next-gen (solid-state) line timing is NOT evidenced in the atlas; flagged as requiring fresh P4 evidence before any promotion.
competition_outlook_2030: Jiaocheng Ultrasonic and Chinese peers (L16-028), plus global ultrasonic majors; incumbent in-house monitoring features are the default. High probability of discard.
timing_window_risk: Foreign entry against entrenched domestic suppliers with >50% customer concentration at two buyers - hardest access profile in this batch; treat as optional.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2032-12-31: kill early if 2027 lab results show no monitoring advantage over incumbent capability.
extreme_edge: Signature-based weld QA extends to ultrasonic additive manufacturing if it industrializes.
first_experiment: 2027-Q3: inline classifier predicts pull-strength category with >=95% accuracy across 5,000 instrumented welds on Cu/Al foil stacks, beating fixed-parameter baseline scrap rates by a measurable margin.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (REJECT): Self-labeled weakest/discardable; 2021-vintage data; entrenched domestic incumbents with >50% buyer concentration.

concept: Plasma-chamber arc and ESC-discharge event detection module with wafer-protection interlock for Chinese etch/deposition tool OEMs
named_buyer_examples: AMEC/NAURA/Piotech tool programs (L06-048, L06-042/043)
painful_job: Arc/micro-arc events in RF chambers damage wafers and chucks; the field is patent-dominated with only thin open literature (single confirmed peer-reviewed in-situ abnormal-discharge detection method, L06-018; ESC discharge physics L06-005/006), meaning incumbent detection ships bundled inside AE/MKS generators (L06-039) - Chinese OEMs localizing RF stacks (L06-054) lack an independent, qualified arc-protection layer.
product: A generator-agnostic arc-event module: RF reflected-power + optical-emission + ESC leakage-transient fusion detection (multi-physics, microsecond latency) with tool-level interlock and event forensics logging - sold to OEMs as the safety/QA layer of domestic RF stacks.
frontier_vision: Chamber-event intelligence across all plasma tools - arc prevention, chuck-life prediction, process drift detection.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: lab reactor arc-injection testbed; multi-sensor dataset; detection algorithm validated vs L06-018 method. 2027-2028: FPGA module prototype <10 microsecond latency; freedom-to-operate analysis against incumbent patents (critical - patent-dense field). 2028-2029: eval unit on a Chinese OEM development chamber via research collaboration.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Rides the same OEM localization wave as B-05 with a smaller, standalone-sellable product; window holds while domestic RF suppliers (L06-042/044) still lack mature protection features.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: AMEC/NAURA supplier-localization programs in the 15th FYP (L06-048, L06-054 gap); attach-rate to every domestic RF generator shipped.
competition_outlook_2030: AE/MKS bundled features (L06-039), Hengyunchang adding basic arc detection (L06-042); moat = multi-physics fusion + forensics. FTO risk is the primary gate.
timing_window_risk: Same export-control caution as B-05; patent thicket documented; small ASP means it may need to bundle with B-05/B-06 - candidate for merge at longlist stage.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-06-30: kill if FTO blocked or no OEM eval by mid-2033.
extreme_edge: Event-forensics data layer becomes chuck/consumable RUL prediction.
first_experiment: 2027-Q3: on an arc-injection testbed, multi-physics fusion detects >=99% of seeded micro-arc events with <10 microsecond latency and <0.1% false-trip rate over 72 h of plasma-on operation.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 FIX applied via merge: folded into P3R2-A-10 as its arc/ESC-discharge event-detection and forensics layer (mature-node scope); FTO analysis before any further investment is A-10's precondition for this layer (patent-dense field). Record retained as audit trail.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (FIX): Real gap, small ASP, patent thicket - merge candidate by its own admission.

concept: DC-link capacitor and converter health prognostics module: embedded ripple/ESR/thermal sensing with physics-based remaining-useful-life models for Chinese HVDC datacenter and industrial converter fleets
named_buyer_examples: Chinese rack/UPS/HVDC power vendors (Delta China L02-048, Autrans L02-049)
State-Grid-supply-chain converter makers as expansion (XJ Electric tender scale, L08-034)
painful_job: DC-link capacitors are a leading converter failure mechanism and higher power density compresses their thermal margin (canonical reliability physics, L02-010); China's 800V datacenter wave multiplies capacitor-dense converters in mission-critical service (L02-054, L02-048) with no standard embedded prognostics layer - fleet operators discover failures reactively.
product: A retrofit/embedded sensing module: in-situ ESR/capacitance tracking via existing ripple excitation (mechanism: synchronous demodulation of switching ripple - no injected signals), hotspot thermal estimation, and physics-of-failure RUL models (electrolyte loss / film self-healing statistics), reporting into vendor fleet software. Hardware+model product, not analytics consulting. FIX: defined as a retrofit SKU (clip-on sensing module + gateway) with the cross-vendor failure database as the compounding moat - not vendor-bespoke analytics.
frontier_vision: The reliability nervous system for the world's converter fleets - datacenters, HVDC valves, EV chargers, drives.
precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: accelerated capacitor-aging lab; validate ripple-demodulation ESR tracking against LCR ground truth across aging; publish. 2027-2028: module prototype in a live 30 kW converter; RUL model calibration; patents on excitation-free tracking. 2028-2029: fleet pilot with one Chinese PSU vendor (design-in via HK); failure-prediction scorecard. FIX gate (2028): LOI from one named design-win path - a PSU/UPS vendor or a third-party maintenance operator; absent it, treat as a feature (sell/license the IP) rather than a company.
launch_2030_timing_thesis: Prognostics value scales with installed fleet age; China's HVDC/800V fleet installed 2026-2029 hits mid-life exactly at 2030-2034, when unplanned failures become boardroom issues; embedded prognostics resists commoditization via failure-database network effects.
demand_trigger_2030_2034: Named: maintenance cycles of the Dong-Shu-Xi-Suan-era HVDC datacenter fleet (L02-048/049) and 800V rollouts (L02-054, L02-043) reaching capacitor mid-life 2030-2034; NVIDIA-spec maintenance-cost framing (up to 70% reduction claims, L02-043) shows operators already buy on maintenance economics.
competition_outlook_2030: Converter vendors' in-house telemetry (default), test-equipment majors, academic spinoffs. Win via excitation-free retrofit capability and cross-vendor failure statistics.
timing_window_risk: Risk of being a feature, not a product - mitigate by also serving third-party maintenance operators; access via vendor design-in; moderate. Keep the US secondary market active from day one so the business is not hostage to CN vendor access.
commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2033-12-31: kill if no vendor design-win by end-2033.
extreme_edge: Same sensing generalizes to IGBT/SiC die-attach degradation tracking.
first_experiment: 2027-Q1: excitation-free ESR tracking stays within 5% of LCR-meter ground truth across a 2,000 h accelerated-aging run on 20 capacitors inside an operating 10 kW converter, correctly rank-ordering end-of-life.
fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 FIX applied: retrofit SKU + cross-vendor failure-database moat made explicit; 2028 named design-win LOI gate added; US secondary market kept active to avoid CN-access dependence.
adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 adjudication (FIX): Elegant excitation-free ESR/RUL sensing; feature-not-product is the honest risk.
